title: Fractions, Decimals, Ratios, and Proportional Structure · Spiral Review
summary: Scale recipes, medication-free training examples, mixtures, maps, and staffing plans without changing relationships. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a proportional scaling and comparison workbook after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent fractions as part-whole, quotient, ratio, operator, and location meanings in context.
Add, subtract, multiply, and divide fractions by reasoning about units and equivalent forms.
Convert among fractions, decimals, and terminating or repeating representations without losing meaning.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
